persona.keigo: (A passionate young knight, bold and fiery male voice, firm heroic delivery with clear diction, confident but not shouting, intense dramatic Japanese anime style)
persona.chuuni: (A theatrical dark sorcerer, intense chuunibyou young male voice, brooding and grandiose, clear dramatic incantation, never shouting, dramatic Japanese anime style)

persona.bushi: (A stern middle-aged samurai, deep resolute male voice, solemn bushido tone, measured and dignified, dramatic Japanese anime style)
